src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/config.general_idea: Register Hibernate5JakartaModule to support Jakarta EE namespace in Jackson serialization for Hibernate entities.
Add a MixIn for ProblemDetail to handle property visibility during JSON serialization, likely to fix issues with Spring Boot 3 error handling.
Expose the configured ObjectMapper to a static utility class for global access.
Update import for GroupedOpenApi to reflect package restructuring in newer SpringDoc OpenAPI versions.
Update the list of test credentials in the OpenAPI documentation description.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/config.human_impl:
description = """... - user@yandex.ru / password

- guest@gmail.com / guest

"""

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/config.general_idea: Remove the exclusion rule for /api/profile/** to include profile endpoints in the generated OpenAPI documentation.

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/error/.general_idea: Refactor AppException to extend RuntimeException instead of ResponseStatusException to simplify error handling logic.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/error/.human_impl: Changed class declaration from `extends ResponseStatusException` to `extends RuntimeException`.

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/error/.general_idea: Remove unused import for Lombok Getter annotation as the class no longer uses Lombok features.
Remove unused import for Spring Boot ErrorAttributeOptions as the field is removed.
Remove unused import for Spring HttpStatus as it is no longer used in the constructor.
Remove unused import for Spring ResponseStatusException as the class no longer extends it.
Add import for Spring NonNull annotation to enforce non-null constraint on the message parameter.
Remove the options field as it is no longer needed for the simplified exception hierarchy.
Simplify the constructor to only accept a message string, removing status and options parameters.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/error/.human_impl: Changed constructor to `public AppException(@NonNull String message) { super(message); }`.

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/error/.general_idea: Remove the overridden getMessage method as the default RuntimeException behavior is sufficient.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/error/.human_impl: Removed the `@Override public String getMessage()` method.

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/error/.general_idea: Remove the Lombok Getter annotation as the class no longer has private fields requiring getters.
Remove Spring Boot specific error attribute options and HTTP status from the exception constructor to simplify the class hierarchy.

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
Remove implementation of Spring Data's Persistable interface to simplify the entity hierarchy and remove dependency on Spring Data specific lifecycle methods.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.human_impl: public abstract class BaseEntity implements HasId { // replaced implements Persistable<Integer>

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.general_idea: Delete the isNew() method override which was required by the Persistable interface.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.human_impl: removed @Override public boolean isNew() { return id == null; }

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.general_idea: Remove the id() helper method that enforced non-null ID checks, likely simplifying access patterns.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.human_impl: removed public int id() { Assert.notNull(id, ...); return id; }

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.general_idea: Clean up imports that are no longer used after removing Persistable and helper methods.
Replace javax.persistence and javax.validation imports with jakarta equivalents required for Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+.
Remove Serializable interface implementation as it is no longer needed for session management in this context.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.human_impl: public class User extends NamedEntity implements HasIdAndEmail { // No session, no needs Serializable

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.general_idea: Change inheritance from BaseEntity to NamedEntity to align with new domain model structure.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.human_impl: public class User extends NamedEntity implements HasIdAndEmail

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.general_idea: Add custom @NoHtml validation annotation to email field to prevent XSS attacks.
Remove firstName and lastName fields, consolidating user identity into a single 'name' field inherited from NamedEntity.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.human_impl: Removed @Column(name = "first_name") ... private String firstName; and lastName fields.

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.general_idea: Add 'enabled' boolean field to track user account status.
Add 'registered' timestamp field to track user creation time.
Remove custom JsonDeserializer for password, relying on standard Jackson WRITE_ONLY access instead.
Rewrite constructors to support new fields (name, enabled, registered) and remove Lombok @AllArgsConstructor.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.human_impl: public User(Integer id, String name, String email, String password, Role... roles) { ... }

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.general_idea: Add hasRole method for convenient role checking.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.human_impl: public boolean hasRole(Role role) { return roles.contains(role); }

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.general_idea: Remove custom setEmail logic that lowercased email, likely delegating to database constraints or other layers.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.human_impl: Removed public void setEmail(String email) { this.email = StringUtils.hasText(email) ? email.toLowerCase() : null; }

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/reposi.general_idea: Removed Spring Data REST specific annotations to decouple the repository from REST exposure.
Removed Swagger/OpenAPI tag annotation from the repository interface.
Removed Spring Cache annotations from repository methods, likely moving caching logic elsewhere or disabling it.
Changed the parent interface from JpaRepository to a custom BaseRepository.
Removed repository methods that are no longer needed or exposed via the new BaseRepository.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/reposi.human_impl: Removed findByLastNameContainingIgnoreCase, save, delete, and deleteById method declarations.

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/reposi.general_idea: Added a default method to handle password encoding and email normalization before saving.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/reposi.human_impl: Added default User prepareAndSave(User user) method with PASSWORD_ENCODER.encode and toLowerCase.

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/reposi.general_idea: Added a default method to find a user by email or throw a NotFoundException.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/reposi.human_impl: Added default User getExistedByEmail(String email) method using orElseThrow.

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/util/J.general_idea: Renamed the static ObjectMapper field and its setter from 'objectMapper' to 'mapper' for brevity.

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/util/J.general_idea: Wrapped checked IOExceptions from Jackson methods in unchecked IllegalArgumentExceptions to simplify the API signature.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/util/J.human_impl: try { return mapper.readValue(...); } catch (IOException e) { throw new IllegalArgumentException(..., e); }

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/web/Au.general_idea: Removed the Lombok @ToString annotation to replace it with a custom implementation.
Added static utility methods to safely retrieve the current authenticated user from the security context.
Added a convenience method to check if the current user has a specific role.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/web/Au.human_impl: Added `public boolean hasRole(Role role)` method delegating to `user.hasRole(role)`.

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/web/Au.general_idea: Implemented a custom toString method to provide a specific string representation of the AuthUser.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/web/Au.human_impl: Added `@Override public String toString()` returning `"AuthUser:" + id() + '[' + user.getEmail() + ']'`.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.6.7 to 3.2.0 to align with Java 21 and Spring Framework 6.
Update project description to reflect the migration to Spring Boot 3.x.
Set the target Java version to 21 to match the migration goal.
Upgrade springdoc-openapi version to 2.3.0 which is compatible with Spring Boot 3.
Define the version property for the new jsoup dependency.
Remove spring-boot-starter-data-rest as part of refactoring away from HATEOAS data rest.
Replace legacy springdoc modules with the unified starter for Spring Boot 3.
Add Jackson Hibernate5 Jakarta datatype to handle Hibernate types in Spring Boot 3 (Jakarta EE).
Add jsoup library, likely for HTML parsing or XSS validation support.
Remove outdated comments regarding JUnit 5 vintage engine and security test integration.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed comments about JUnit 5 vintage and Baeldung security tests
